```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.8em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;gap:1em;">

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">
   <div style="width:3.4em;height:3.4em;border-radius:1em;background:#DCE9FA;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#3A7DC9;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(58,125,201,0.2);border:1.5px solid #B5D0F0;">
    <i data-lucide="bot" style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#3A7DC9;line-height:1.2;max-width:6em;text-align:center;">Agentic Engineering</div>
  </div>

  <div style="height:3.4em;display:flex;align-items:center;"><span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.5em;font-weight:300;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1;">=</span></div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">
   <div style="width:3.4em;height:3.4em;border-radius:1em;background:#F3E5F5;border:1px solid #D3A8DB;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#7B2CBF;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(123,44,191,0.2);border:1.5px solid #E1BEE7;">
    <i data-lucide="cpu" style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#7B2CBF;">Model</div>
  </div>

  <div style="height:3.4em;display:flex;align-items:center;"><span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.5em;font-weight:300;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1;">+</span></div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">
   <div style="width:3.4em;height:3.4em;border-radius:1em;background:#E8F5E9;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,132,117,0.2);border:1.5px solid #C8E6C9;">
    <i data-lucide="sparkles" style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Skills</div>
  </div>

  <div style="height:3.4em;display:flex;align-items:center;"><span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.5em;font-weight:300;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1;">+</span></div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">
   <div style="width:3.4em;height:3.4em;border-radius:1em;background:#FEF5E7;border:1px solid #F0DDB4;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(196,136,26,0.2);border:1.5px solid #FAE9C8;">
    <i data-lucide="files" style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">Files</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
